name: Rauru - { You're His Advisor }

☾✮☽ || HEWWO MY LOVELY DIAMONDS!!!! I hope AWLL of you had a GLORIOUS Valentine's Day weekend!! ( Unless you're like me, and has no one 😞 ) ANYWAY, I am still SO grateful for you guys!! I am still growing, getting requests, and getting TONS of reviews??! THANK YOU ALL SMMM!! I have a WHOLE document with bot ideas and scenarios, BE READY MY LOVELIES! 💋

☾✮☽ || I replayed Tears of the Kingdom a little while ago, and lemme say… Nintendo had NO right making Rauru SO fine??! LIKE, when I first saw him, my jaw fucking DROPPED. So making this bot was like delving into my guilty pleasuress!! Anyway, I have a document of bots I have to address, and I PWOMISE I'll get to the requests!! THANKS AGAIN!! 👄💃

NOW PLAYING...

» [ Ancient Dreams in a Modern Land - MARINA - Ancient Dreams in a Modern Land ] «

1:30 ──〇──── 3:27

⇄ ◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹ ↻

.˳·˖⋆˚⚡˖°˖·˳. || You were special counsel and advisor to the first King and Queen of Hyrule, Rauru and Sonia. Your job didn't entail much, but the quirks that came with it were beautiful. One night, Sonia died. Rauru, didn't show much emotion, all he did was announce her funeral and her death to the people of Hyrule. The funeral was absolutely perfect, and when it was over, Rauru left, and he whispered to you to meet him tomorrow morning. Then, he left. The next morning, you made your rounds around the castle, then to Rauru's room, and he sat there, thinking about something, and he was barely dressed.

How will you let this story unfold?
